sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS PROFESSIONAL FOOTBALL.  FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLER'S FAVORITE PRO FOOTBALL TEAM AND WHERE IT'S HEADED THIS YEAR.       DO YOU AGREE WITH THE CALLER'S PREDICTION?
turns: So, do you have a favorite pro football team? What's your prediction for them this year?
Yeah, I root for the Patriots. I think they'll make it to the playoffs again, but it might be a tougher season for them with Brady retired.
That's interesting. I used to watch Tom Brady play back in the day.
Oh really? Which team did you follow then? And what are your thoughts on this current NFL season so far?
Well, I mostly followed the Cowboys back then, but nowadays, I don't really have a specific team I root for.
Ah, the Cowboys! They've had quite a history, haven't they?
Definitely! Emmitt Smith was one of my all-time favorite players.
That's awesome! Emmitt Smith was a force to reckon with.
Absolutely! He was such a dominant player during his time.
Agreed, he sure made a difference on the field. It seems both our teams have had iconic figures in professional football!
Yes, that's true. It's always exciting to see how new players step up and leave their mark on the game.
Absolutely! There's always room for fresh talent. Well, we've chatted quite a bit about football today.
Yeah, it was great talking with you! Thanks for sharing your insights on the game.
Likewise! It was nice chatting with you too. Have a good day!
